=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] **Stewardship result:** 2 entries found — #3486 kept (good quality lesson), #3484 deprecated (duplicate, miscategorized as pattern).

**Phase 2: Spawn architect.**

Retrospective briefing:

```
RETROSPECTIVE BRIEFING for bugfix-389
======================================
Sessions: 1 | Records: 721 | Tool calls: 345 | Duration: 87m

HOTSPOTS (10 detected):
- [warning] context_load: 194 KB loaded before first write (discovery phase, 2 clusters)
- [warning] lifespan: rust-dev agent ran 51–59 minutes (fix phase)
- [warning] compile_cycles: 37 compile/check cycles (fix phase, 16 clusters)
- [warning] file_breadth: 22 distinct files accessed (discovery phase)
- [warning] tool_failure_hotspot: mcp__unimatrix__context_get failed 4 times (discovery phase)
- [info] edit_bloat: avg Edit response 194.9 KB (3.9× typical)
- [info] output_parsing_struggle: cargo clippy piped through 3 filters in 3 min
- [info] reread_rate: 20 files re-read multiple times
- [info] search_via_bash: 11.1% of Bash calls are search commands
- [info] sleep_workarounds: 4 sleep workarounds detected

BASELINE OUTLIERS:
- edit_bloat_ratio: 0.6 vs mean 0.2 (1.5σ) — Outlier
- agent_hotspot_count: 7.0 vs mean 3.6 (1.5σ) — Outlier

RECOMMENDATIONS:
- [sleep_workarounds] Use run_in_background + TaskOutput instead of sleep polling
- [compile_cycles] Batch field additions before compiling

REWORK SIGNALS: None — no gate failures, single pass through all phases.

WHAT WENT WELL:
- permission_friction_events: 1.0 vs mean 18.1 (low friction)
- bash_for_search_count: 122 vs mean 150.7 (Grep/Glob used correctly)
- coordinator_respawn_count: 0 vs mean 1.4 (no SM context loss)
- post_completion_work_pct: 0 vs mean 5.6 (clean stop)

NOTE: "No goal recorded for this cycle" — expected; cycle_start was called
before the fix was deployed. This is the irony of the bug: the session that
fixed goal-not-persisting also couldn't persist its own goal.

STEWARDSHIP: #3486 stored (lesson, good quality). #3484 deprecated (duplicate/miscategorized).
```
[tool: mcp__unimatrix__context_deprecate(Duplicate of #3486 (lesson-learned). Miscategorized as pattern — this is a gotcha/lesson about payload construction om) → ]
